summary: Completed testing of AI income_flow_analysis and Historical Trend Comparison features. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 8 test scenarios passed (100%). Both features are fully functional.

backend_ai_analysis.income_flow_analysis_present: PASSED - Field exists in analysis object
backend_ai_analysis.income_flow_analysis_content: PASSED - Contains substantial financial analysis text (>50 chars) with financial terms
backend_ai_analysis.trends_analysis_present: PASSED - Field exists when multiple periods available
backend_ai_analysis.response_structure: PASSED - All required fields present (executive_summary, profitability_analysis, returns_analysis, liquidity_analysis, solvency_analysis, income_flow_analysis, recommendations)

frontend_encyclopedia_benchmark.benchmark_banner: PASSED - data-testid='benchmark-banner' visible with current value and evaluation level
frontend_encyclopedia_benchmark.benchmark_trend: PASSED - data-testid='benchmark-trend' shows % change and previous period value
frontend_encyclopedia_benchmark.nav_trend_arrows: PASSED - Left nav shows green up (TrendingUp) or red down (TrendingDown) arrows next to metric values
frontend_encyclopedia_benchmark.metric_switching: PASSED - Clicking different metrics updates the trend comparison
frontend_encyclopedia_benchmark.oldest_period_no_trend: PASSED - When 2024-01 selected (no previous period), trend section not shown
frontend_encyclopedia_benchmark.middle_period_trend: PASSED - When 2024-02 selected, shows trend vs 2024-01
frontend_encyclopedia_benchmark.trend_direction_correct: PASSED - Red arrows for negative changes, green for positive

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data. 3 periods available: 2024-01, 2024-02, 2024-03
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Analysis and Encyclopedia Trend features fully tested. Key data-testids: benchmark-banner (shows current value + evaluation), benchmark-trend (shows % change vs previous period), enc-nav-{metric_key} (nav items with trend arrows). Backend endpoint: GET /api/financial-statements/ai-analysis?period_type=monthly&period_value=2024-03&language=es returns income_flow_analysis and trends_analysis in the analysis object. The income_flow_analysis is rendered on Page 6 of PDF (Sankey breakdown section) in BoardReport.js line ~1080.

income_flow_analysis.backend: Returns detailed analysis of income statement flow - cost of sales %, operating expenses efficiency, revenue to net profit conversion
income_flow_analysis.pdf_rendering: Rendered in BoardReport.js line 1080-1091 under Sankey breakdown section

historical_trend_comparison.benchmark_banner: Shows current value, evaluation level (Rentabilidad sólida/baja/etc), and trend comparison
historical_trend_comparison.trend_display: Format: +1923.5% vs 2024-02 (-2.5%) - shows % change and previous period value
historical_trend_comparison.nav_arrows: Green TrendingUp for positive changes, Red TrendingDown for negative
historical_trend_comparison.inverted_metrics: DSO, DPO, cash_conversion_cycle, debt_to_equity, debt_to_assets correctly show inverted trend direction
